name: Pickled Okra
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash okra, leaving the top cap and removing excess stem.
2. Combine vinegar, water, and kosher salt in a pot. Bring to a boil.
3. Drop okra into boiling mixture (and chiles if using fresh chiles), bringing back to a rolling boil.
4. Pack hot jars with okra and chiles (if using dried instead of fresh chiles, add 1 or more dried chiles per jar).
5. Seal jars while still hot.
6. Allow pickles to stand for 8-10 weeks before serving.
